findings.description: Knowledge file states the cross-reference target `01_customJspAnalysisProp` is in `01_JspStaticAnalysis`, but the source only contains `:ref:\`01_customJspAnalysisProp\`` with no indication of which file defines that label. The anchor `.. _01_customJspAnalysis:` is defined in the source file, but `01_customJspAnalysisProp` is NOT — it is defined in a different document (likely `02_JspStaticAnalysisInstall.rst`). The knowledge file fabricated `01_JspStaticAnalysis` as the containing file.
findings.source_evidence: 詳細は、 :ref:`01_customJspAnalysisProp` を参照 (no file name specified in source; anchor `01_customJspAnalysisProp` is not defined anywhere in this source file)
